# Holloway Davies

> ICAEW chartered accountants for UK limited companies, contractors, sole traders and partnerships. Corporation tax, VAT, payroll, R&D credits, MTD, incorporation and exit planning. National coverage, fixed fees, 2025/26 UK figures throughout.

## About

Holloway Davies is a generalist UK chartered accounting practice serving limited company directors, contractors, freelancers, sole traders, and partnerships across the country. Cloud-first delivery (Xero, FreeAgent, QuickBooks), national coverage, ICAEW-qualified network.
